headline: Entergy (ETR) Q1 Earnings Miss Estimates
summary: Entergy (ETR) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of -3.22% and +6.08%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
